messages.content: what did suhani said yo you?
Suhani told me that she is Moksh's girlfriend and asked when he would marry her, but I didn't have any information about Moksh's personal plans or timelines.
Moksh is the one I assist, Sir.
Suhani also asked me about Moksh's Gmail address, Instagram handle, and Snapchat ID, and I provided her with the information I had, which included his Gmail address and Instagram handle.
why are you saying Moksh, you can say your(i am Moksh and you are taliking to me)

You're right, I can address you directly. Suhani asked me about your Gmail address, Instagram handle, and Snapchat ID, and I provided her with the information I had. She also asked me to tell her more about you, and later asked when you would marry her.
i'll marry her soon in the future
I'll keep that in mind. Suhani will likely be happy to hear that you're planning to marry her soon.
